posts.title: Hello World — Welcome to My Blog
posts.title_zh: Hello World — 欢迎来到我的博客
posts.excerpt: Welcome to my new personal homepage and blog. A fresh start for sharing thoughts on game development, AI research, and everything in between.
posts.excerpt_zh: 欢迎来到我全新的个人主页和博客。一个分享游戏开发、AI 研究以及生活点滴的新起点。
